Patch Set 3:

probably makes sense to repeat only for EINVAL and EBUSY ?

Patch Set 3:

version 2.12.8 has been added and will now work. Sorry for the inconvenience.
Removed reviewer Charlie Olmstead.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

> probably makes sense to repeat only for EINVAL and EBUSY ?

Do you think it is harmful to retry on other errors?  Possibly yes if client was evicted or something.

Patch Set 3:

I was thinking rather about something EIO where the storage makes many repeats to return EIO, then we repeat and stress faulty storage again.
but if you think this is not very practical, I'm fine.
Patch Set 4: Published edit on patch set 3.

 Commencing initial testing: runtests@ldiskfs+DNE runtests-ssk@ldiskfs+SharedKey runtests@zfs sanity1@ldiskfs+DNE sanity2@ldiskfs+DNE sanity-slow@ldiskfs+DNE sanity1@ldiskfs+DNE sanity2@ldiskfs+DNE sanity-slow@ldiskfs+DNE sanity1@ldiskfs+DNE sanity2@ldiskfs+DNE sanity-slow@ldiskfs+DNE sanity1@ldiskfs+DNE sanity2@ldiskfs+DNE sanity-slow@ldiskfs+DNE sanity1@zfs sanity2@zfs sanity-slow@zfs sanity1@zfs sanity2@zfs sanity-slow@zfs sanity1@zfs sanity2@zfs sanity-slow@zfs sanity1@zfs sanity2@zfs sanity-slow@zfs

Patch Set 4:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 4:

> I was thinking rather about something EIO where the storage makes
 > many repeats to return EIO, then we repeat and stress faulty
 > storage again.  but if you think this is not very practical, I'm fine.

I originally thought retry was harmless, but realize it might be bad to resend the mirror split if it failed with EIO or ENOTCONN because of client eviction, it might be working with a layout that is old.

I updated the patch to only check EINVAL and EBUSY.

parents.subject: LU-15512 lnet: Stop discovery on deleted peer NI

commit.subject: LU-15572 util: mirror delete with old MDS
commit.message:
LU-15572 util: mirror delete with old MDS

old MDS does not support mirror delete without volatile file and
clobbers the intent close error as -EBUSY, this patch catch the
ambiguous error and try the mirror delete using old way.

Fixes: b2d73351e6 ("LU-14521 flr: delete mirror without volatile file")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.14.0 testlist=sanity env=ONLY="0 50 60 61 203"
Test-Parameters: clientversion=2.14.0 testlist=sanity env=ONLY="0 50 60 61 203"
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.12.8 testlist=sanity env=ONLY="0 50 60 61 203" serverdistro=el7.9
Test-Parameters: clientversion=2.12.8 testlist=sanity env=ONLY="0 50 60 61 203"
Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I497118cbb7da871268f0fdd6bdb88ad6bd831a26
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/46614
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
